meta.description: A single step in a human procedure.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_4ed10ac0_a7bd_4b9d_b01d_bed6f614a32a" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "instructions" TEXT,
    "role" TEXT,
    "expected_outcome" TEXT,
    "warnings" TEXT,
    "optional" BOOLEAN,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_4ed10ac0_a7bd_4b9d_b01d_bed6f614a32a" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_4ed10ac0a7bd4b9d_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
